# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent sqs policy too permissive.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  MyQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # 1 day
      VisibilityTimeout: 300 # 5 minutes
  MyTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: MyTopic
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - Ref: MyQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
